title: Tick 25: ship Claude Desktop config snippet plus transcript runroc that exercises the full MCP handshake against the live outcomes-mcp worker
question: Does docs claude-desktop-config-snippet json declare an outcomes-mcp entry via the mcp-remote stdio shim that the operator can merge into claude_desktop_config json and does outcomes runrocs F3-desktop md record the full initialize tools/list tools/call transcript proving the Desktop path works end-to-end?
success_criteria: docs claude-desktop-config-snippet json present declaring outcomes-mcp via npx mcp-remote with a Bearer token placeholder and step-by-step install notes
outcomes runrocs F3-desktop md captures the 3-call transcript initialize tools/list and tools/call with HTTP 200 on each and the canonical floor 3.5 in the spec_info response
the operator's current claude_desktop_config json was observed (verified mcpServers contains pdf and MCP_DOCKER) so the snippet is additive not destructive
the runroc documents the operator action to capture the literal in-Desktop transcript with a 5 step procedure

capabilities: Desktop config snippet present at docs claude-desktop-config-snippet json
live worker proves the full MCP handshake end-to-end via initialize tools/list tools/call
spec_info returned canonical_floor 3.5 matching v0.1.0 of the spec
operator action steps documented for transcript capture
